title: epidendrum sarcoglottis
intro: Epidendrum sarcoglottis, also known as the Yellow Dendrobium or Yellow Dendrobium Orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Epidendrum sarcoglottis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating conditions such as fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
